message:
fix(pipeline): add retry support and validation for parallel step execution

This refactors executeParallelStep to add:

1. Validation for unsupported nested structures
   - Nested parallel steps within parallel groups now fail early with
     clear error message
   - Loop steps within parallel groups also rejected

2. Retry logic for parallel steps
   - Previously only sequential steps supported on_error: retry
   - Parallel steps now honor retry_count, retry_delay, and retry_backoff
   - Retries reuse the same pane to avoid "self-exclusion" issues

3. Improved error handling structure
   - Clearer flow with labeled goto for result handling
   - Better separation of execution phases (prompt, send, wait, capture)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
